Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4107 0 0}Good job. You did well handling a strong opponent.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}I'm feeling confident in your ability to lead. How do you feel?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4131 0 0}Well, you're sounding quite confident yourself. Keep it up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4131 0 0}Don't worry, you're doing just fine. All you need is more experience.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4131 0 0}Well, I can see your potential. I'm looking forward to seeing what you can do.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}All right, time to resume exploration. Let me know if you need something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4108 0 0}Great work. The path ahead is now accessible.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}We can stop here for the day, if you want. What do you think?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4113 0 0}All right. You can use the teleporter nearby to return to the entrance.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4113 0 0}Roger that. Then I'll continue providing support as you go on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4094 0 0}As the leader, it's your decision what to do in the field.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}Do you want to continue the exploration today? How do you feel?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4115 0 0}All right. Let's resume after you catch your breath. I'll continue backing you up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4113 0 0}Very well, then return to the entrance. It's good not to push yourselves.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}Oh, I'm not forcing you. You should decide based on the current situation.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}It seems you've gotten the hang of fighting here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4107 0 0}Indeed. I'm impressed. You might even get by without my support.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4131 0 0}*chuckle* Is that you being humble? You never fail to surprise me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4065 0 0}I'm glad to hear it. We can never be sure what will happen in here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}Hm... I must say, when I see all of you in action, it makes me want to join in too...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}...Never mind. Please continue exploring.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4030 0 0}I can't believe you managed victory all on your own! I must commend you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 50 0 0}Whatever your goal was in fighting alone... it was quite a spectacle indeed.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}However, I would personally prefer if you took someone along with you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4024 0 0}Yes, there's no reason to take the risk of going alone.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}Everyone else is ready. Come back to the entrance if you want to form a party.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 6 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}I see... Well, you are the leader in the field, so I won't question your tactics.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}But while I trust in your abilities, make sure you're being careful at all times.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4036 0 0}The decision is yours, but it's important for the others to gain experience, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}If you want anyone to join you, come back to the entrance and form a party.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}All right, I'll be counting on you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5011 0 0}The enemy has been defeated. Great work, everyone![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Leader, your direction was amazing![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5145 0 0}Yes, I knew I didn't have to worry. You did a great job, {f 4 1}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5122 0 0}Oh, really? Well, I think you did very well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 1 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5122 0 0}Wh-What? I don't... Um... Well, I'm glad if I was able to help you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Anyway, there's a staircase up ahead. Keep it up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}This could be a good place to stop. Do you want to return for the day?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5061 0 0}Oh, I see. Okay, I'll continue supporting you, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5065 0 0}Well, you never know what will happen, so I think it's good to be careful...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}But it's up to you, Leader. Just don't push yourself too hard, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5087 0 0}The enemy has been defeated! Thanks for your hard work, everyone.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}If you're feeling up to it, how about exploring for a little more?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5145 0 0}Okay! The stairs that lead to the next floor are right up ahead![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5145 0 0}All right. Be careful on your way down.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}It's a tough decision... Pulling back for now is definitely an option as well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}Well, we'll do whatever you decide we should do, {f 4 1}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5086 0 0}The enemy has been defeated! How is everyone doing?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Um... Sorry if it's weird to bring this up right now, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}I really respect you all for fighting on the front line, despite the danger.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5099 0 0}Oh, is that so? Well, even still, I think it's amazing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}Now that I think about it, I guess even I am more calm now than I was at first...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_049_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5060 0 0}Yeah... Even just one wrong move could lead to something terrible...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}But I'll be sure to keep supporting you so nothing like that ever happens.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_050_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}Sometimes, I wish I could... But I don't think that's very realistic for me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}So, instead, I'll do whatever I can to keep you all safe on your journey.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}Oh, um... Anyway, I just wanted to say that I'm really thankful to everyone.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}Let's all keep doing our best![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_052_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5088 0 0}Wow... I can't believe you managed to win all by yourself![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}Everyone else is shocked, too. Do you plan to keep going alone?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_053_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'll go as far as I can.

Dialog.name: MSG_054_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5116 0 0}All right. Honestly, I'm a little worried about you being on your own there...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}But I'm also excited to see what else you're capable of. Just please be careful.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_055_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5099 0 0}Oh, then please come back immediately! You'll be safer with a full party.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_056_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}Okay. I'm sure you'd be fine, but please don't push yourself either.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_057_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}Everyone here is cheering you on and ready to join you if you need them.[n]{f 1 1}
